positive: A stylized, geometric representation of a whimsical forest scene, featuring silhouettes of glowing bioluminescent flora, delicate winding vines, and abstract animal profiles (like deer and foxes) nestled in the undergrowth. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a repeating seamless pattern or a single central print. Use a limited color palette of deep midnight blue, vibrant electric teal, and glowing emerald green, providing extreme contrast against a subtly textured black background. The style should blend Art Nouveau elegance with modern minimalist geometric etching, giving the appearance of a sacred, enchanted map etching. Focus on clean lines, high contrast, and strong visual structure, maximizing print readability.
negative: blur, grainy, watermark, signature, text, logo, messy, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, out of focus, jpeg artifacts, oversaturation
